hero.label: Artisan Tea Collection
hero.title: From Leaf to Cup
hero.subtitle: Discover single-origin teas sourced directly from small farms across the world's finest growing regions.

origin_map.label: Global Origins
origin_map.title: Where Our Teas Grow
origin_map.subtitle: Each tea tells the story of its terroir — the soil, altitude, and climate that shape its character.

brewing_guide.label: The Perfect Cup
brewing_guide.title: Brewing Guide
brewing_guide.subtitle: Master the art of brewing with these essential steps.
brewing_guide.step1_desc: Use 2g of loose leaf per 200ml of water for the perfect ratio.
brewing_guide.step1_tip: Pro Tip: Weigh your leaves using a digital scale for consistency.
brewing_guide.step2_desc: Each tea has its ideal temperature. Green at 75°C, black at 95°C.
brewing_guide.step2_tip: Pro Tip: Preheat your teapot with hot water before brewing.
brewing_guide.step3_desc: Patience is key. 2-3 min for green, 3-5 min for black teas.
brewing_guide.step3_tip: Pro Tip: Don't oversteep! Use a timer to capture the perfect flavor.
brewing_guide.step4_desc: Savor the aroma first, then taste. Each sip reveals new layers.
brewing_guide.step4_tip: Pro Tip: High-quality leaves can be steeped multiple times.

newsletter.title: Stay Connected
newsletter.subtitle: Get first access to new harvests, brewing tips, and exclusive offers.
